center_switcher_desc: Choose the tenant first, then narrow the dashboard to a specific location only when you need to.
center_switcher_tenants_desc: Each tenant represents a gym company inside BetterFit.
center_switcher_locations_waiting: Select a tenant to browse its locations.
center_switcher_all_locations_desc: Keep the dashboard at tenant level and include every location.
center_switcher_no_tenants: No tenants available for this account.
center_switcher_no_tenants_desc: Create your first tenant to unlock the operational dashboard.
center_switcher_no_locations: No locations available for this tenant.
center_switcher_setup_tenant_desc: Spin up a new tenant when you are opening a new company, brand, or independent business unit.
center_switcher_setup_location_desc: Add another physical gym inside {gym} without leaving the dashboard.
center_switcher_setup_location_waiting: Choose a tenant first to add a new physical gym location.
dashboard_no_tenants_title: Create your first tenant to start using BetterFit
dashboard_no_tenants_desc: This workspace is ready, but it does not contain any tenant workspaces or gym locations yet.
dashboard_no_tenants_help: Once the first tenant is created, the operational pages will become available automatically. If setup just finished in another tab, refresh this dashboard.
dashboard_no_tenants_focus_desc: Create a tenant for the company first, then decide whether to add the first gym location right away or keep the workspace at tenant level for now.
dashboard_tenants_error_title: We couldn't load your tenant access
dashboard_tenants_error_desc: The dashboard is temporarily blocked because BetterFit could not verify which tenants or gyms you can open.
dashboard_tenants_error_fallback: Try again in a moment. If the problem keeps happening, verify the backend is reachable and that your account has valid permissions.
dashboard_navigation_disabled_suffix: available after your first tenant is created
setup_flow_step_type_desc: Keep tenants and gym locations separate from the start so the structure stays clear as the business grows.
setup_flow_step_tenant_desc: The tenant is the company-level workspace. You can keep it broad or add the first gym location immediately.
setup_flow_step_target_tenant_desc: Choose which tenant should receive the new physical gym location.
setup_flow_step_location_desc: Add the basics that help staff recognize this location instantly inside the dashboard.
setup_flow_step_first_location_desc: Set up the first gym location now so the tenant opens with a clear operational scope from day one.
setup_flow_step_review_desc: You are about to create the tenant workspace. Gym locations can be added later from the scope switcher.
setup_flow_type_tenant_desc: Create a new gym company inside BetterFit.
setup_flow_type_tenant_help: Use this for a new brand, company, or business unit that should have its own workspace.
setup_flow_type_location_desc: Add a physical gym inside an existing tenant.
setup_flow_type_location_help: Use this when the company already exists and you are opening another site.
setup_flow_tenant_note_desc: This name should describe the business entity, not just a single site. Individual gyms can be added underneath it.
setup_flow_scope_title: How do you want to start?
setup_flow_scope_tenant_only_desc: Create the company workspace first and add the first gym location later when details are ready.
setup_flow_scope_tenant_and_location_des: Create the tenant and its first physical gym location in the same guided flow.
setup_flow_target_tenant_hint_desc: Locations stay grouped under the company, so operational reporting and permissions remain easy to understand.
setup_flow_review_tenant_desc: This creates the company-level workspace and makes it available in the scope switcher immediately.
setup_flow_review_next_steps_desc: Once the tenant is ready, you can add one or more gym locations at any time from the tenant and location switcher.
setup_flow_creating_desc: BetterFit is preparing the new structure and wiring it into the dashboard.
setup_flow_success_desc: The new structure is ready to use in the dashboard.
setup_flow_success_tenant_and_location: The tenant and its first gym location were created successfully.
setup_flow_success_tenant_only: The tenant was created successfully. You can add the first gym location later.
setup_flow_success_location_only: The new gym location was added successfully.
setup_flow_error_generic: Something went wrong while creating the new structure. Please try again.
setup_flow_footer_note: Names can stay lightweight here. More operational details can be configured later.
setup_flow_sheet_desc: Guided onboarding to create a new tenant workspace or an additional gym location.
setup_flow_validation_intent_required: Choose whether you want to create a tenant or a gym location.
setup_flow_validation_location_requires_: You need at least one tenant before you can add a gym location.
setup_flow_validation_tenant_max: Tenant name must be at most {count} characters.
setup_flow_validation_target_tenant_requ: Choose which tenant should receive this gym location.
setup_flow_validation_location_max: Gym name must be at most {count} characters.
setup_flow_validation_location_code_max: Internal code must be at most {count} characters.
setup_flow_validation_city_max: City must be at most {count} characters.
setup_flow_validation_address_max: Address must be at most {count} characters.
setup_flow_validation_country_code_inval: Use a 2-letter country code such as IT or US.
search_global_placeholder: Global search: member, receipt, booking, device...
home_error_desc: Unable to load the real Home dashboard data.
alert_showers_controller_offline_desc: Last heartbeat 3 min ago. Suggested technical ticket.
timeline_event_qr_access_turnstile_2: Valid app QR entry at Turnstile 2
timeline_event_qr_access_turnstile_1: Valid app QR entry at Turnstile 1
access_live_page_desc: Realtime visibility for turnstiles, showers and denied entries.
access_live_error_title: Unable to load live access monitor
access_live_error_desc: Placeholder access data is currently unavailable.
access_live_kpi_people_inside_trend: Weight area currently at high occupancy
access_live_events_desc: Recent access events with source and outcome.
access_live_controllers_desc: Monitor latency and trigger remote actions.
access_live_denials_desc: Members to contact quickly from the front desk.
access_live_desk_actions_desc: Rapid remote controls for urgent support.
access_live_desk_action_note: Buttons are placeholder actions until API endpoints are connected.
auth_login_desc: Sign in to your Betterfit dashboard
auth_verify_email_desc: We sent a verification code to your email address. Enter the code below to continue.
auth_code_expired: Your code has expired. Request a new one.
auth_session_expired: Your verification session has expired. Please log in again.
auth_2fa_desc: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
auth_two_factor_session_expired: Your two-factor session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth_2fa_setup_desc: This gym requires 2FA. Add the secret below to your authenticator app, then confirm with a 6-digit code.
auth_2fa_setup_instructions: Add this key in Google Authenticator, 1Password, or another TOTP app, then enter the first 6-digit code to finish setup.
auth_2fa_recovery_codes_desc: Store these one-time recovery codes somewhere safe before continuing. Each code can be used only once.
auth_validation_password_policy: Use at least 8 characters, including a lowercase letter and a number.
auth_validation_fullname_max: Use {count} characters or fewer for your name.
auth_error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
